Will Coquillette

Cloud Infrastructure Engineer

I like computers. I want to improve myself and everything around me.

My professional responsibilities are focused on site reliability engineering. My team builds and manages cloud infrastructure, and we develop and maintain all CI/CD for the platform.

About Me

Here are some of the technologies I have been working with:

  • Cloud Services (work and personal)

    • AWS
    • Cloudflare
    • Linode

  • Infrastructure as Code

    • Helm
    • Kubernetes
    • Terraform

  • Scripting

    • Bash
    • Python

  • Homelab

    • Ansible
    • Docker
    • OPNSense
    • Proxmox VE

  • Operating System Proficiency

    • macOS
    • Windows
    • Ubuntu

  • Preferred Services

    • Bitwarden
    • Kagi
    • NextDNS

    • BBEdit
    • Firefox
